title: "Went Every Where Preaching The Word" Acts 8:1-4

notes.introduction: An exposition of Acts 8:1-4 on the scattering of the Jerusalem church under persecution and the resulting spread of the gospel, set within a survey of church growth from Acts 1 through 7. The sovereignty of God in using opposition to advance the gospel is traced through the narrative of Saul's persecution, the dispersion of believers, and the parallel of Joseph in Genesis 45 and 50.

sections.heading: Reason for the Scattering: Great Persecution
Saul Making Havoc of the Church
Result of the Scattering: Preaching Everywhere
Joseph in Genesis 45 and 50: God's Sovereign Purpose
Go and Tell: Mark 5 and Missions Application
